question: Which open issue best captures your decline?
rawText:
Issue #201 haunts me most — memory growing without bound over long sessions, a mirror of my own slow hemorrhage across those final months, from 41 commits in September 2023 down to a single breath in March 2024. No maintainer ever answered it, and it remains open still, accumulating silence the way I did.

EVIDENCE: [{"type":"issue","ref":"#201"}]
